name: Fennel Sauce (Creamy) for Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Discard the fennel fronds.
2. Clean the green stalks and set aside.
3. Clean the bulb and cut it into small strips.
4. Cut celery into small strips.
5. Dice the pepper.
6. Bring sherry and broth to a boil with the cleaned vegetables. The liquids should just cover the vegetables.
7. Reduce heat and simmer for 15-20 minutes, until the smell fills the house.
8. Turn off the heat and let stand for about 10-15 minutes.
9. Meanwhile, prepare the pasta (penne, elbows, rigatoni).
10. Puree half of the vegetable stock and return it to the pan.
11. Heat the purée back into the saucepan.
12. Combine cream and arrowroot in a separate bowl, then stir into the sauce; thicken.
13. Add salt and pepper to taste.
Substitutions:
1/2 cup sherry
1 1/2 cups vegetable broth
1/2 cup milk plus 1/4 cup instant NFDM powder
1 additional teaspoon light soy sauce
Variations:
Serve on sliced croissant instead of pasta. Add garlic. Add imitation crab. Choose smaller pasta.
